# FRA-BER MULTIFORCE 4.54L Powerful Multi-Purpose Degreaser For Stubborn Dirt

https://www.gecegy.com/shop/fra-ber-multiforce-italian-multi-purpose-stubborn-dirt-degreaser-4-54l-8165
https://www.gecegy.com/web/image/product.template/8165/image_1920?unique=cc6d512

### Description:

Tackle the toughest grime with FRA-BER MULTIFORCE, a powerful and concentrated multi-purpose degreaser designed for both interior and exterior cleaning of vehicles and various environments.

#### Key Features:

- Strong degreasing power for grease, smog, stains, and traffic film

- Suitable for cars, machinery, shipyards, workshops, and homes

- Contains anti-corrosive agents to protect surfaces

- Fast-acting with a renewing effect

#### Directions for Use:
• 4.54 L (Concentrated):

- 
For heavy dirt, use undiluted and let sit for 1 minute, then wipe
- For light dirt: dilute up to 1:3
- As APC (All-Purpose Cleaner): dilute 1:10
#### Warnings:

- Do not apply under direct sunlight or on delicate surfaces

- Do not let the product dry on the surface

*
